accounts._comment: MANUAL ON PURPOSE. The token can see 17 ad accounts and five of them are called some variant of Playmore. On auto the run walked all 17, burned its Meta rate limit on dead accounts, and by the time it reached Playmore 26 EGP Clean (which is last in the list and is the one that actually spends) the API returned nothing. Worse, the empty account called 'Playmore $' matched the playmore channel first and posted 'NO SPEND' over the top of it. Two accounts spend money. These are those two.

slack._routing: each account posts to its own channel; matched by keyword in the account name, else default.

channels._memo: one channel per brand per window. All 12 cards land in the matching one.

slack._launches: ads created in the last 3 days, followed daily until each one earns a verdict. Posted once a day off the daily run.
slack._schedule: daily + 3day every morning 09:17 Cairo. 7day every SATURDAY 02:17 Cairo. 30day on the FIRST of the month 02:17 Cairo. launches every morning.
